name: Neighbors
short_description: A folk noir detective horror game. An old time detective trying to find out the truth behind a missing girl in a mysterious place.
detailed_description:
A dark noir mysterious dream. Like an old photograph come to life. A detective visits a far away hotel in order to investigate what happened to a missing girl and solve the mysteries that lie within the walls of this cold and strange place. With a deep and dark atmosphere to explore.

Navigate this strange place and investigate the even stranger residents to get to the truth. Find objects, solve puzzles and have deep conversation with the residents and staff. Help people or hurt people. An old folk noir fairytale come to life.
